prompt: I have a multi-page PDF report at ./test-data/quarterly-report.pdf that contains financial tables and text summaries. I need you to: (1) extract all text from the PDF and save it as extracted-text.json in JSON format, (2) extract any tables from pages 1-3 and save as tables.json, (3) create a new summary PDF from a markdown file I have at ./test-data/summary.md and save it as summary-report.pdf with A4 page size. Show me the JSON output from each operation.
